content_body: What a fantastic adventure this has been for us! 4 days and 3 nights - ultimate relaxation at a great place! Our favorite things were the creek, the hot tub, the fireplace and the pool table. The book that comes with the cabin is super helpful - we loved the tours by care...I think we did every one of them - the directions were spot on! The Master bedroom upstairs was so incredibly comfortable. We loved that the cabin came equipped with anything and everything you could ever need. All in all, this was a 10 out of 10 for the experience! Thanks so much.
title: 10 Star Vacation at Crooked Creek Cabin in Blue Ridge
